mapper.select: SELECT s.GW_ID AS gwId, s.SYSTEM_ID AS systemId, s.OPER_MODE_TYPE AS operModeType, s.IP AS ip, s.PORT AS port, s.STOP_YN AS stopYn, s.SYSTEM_DESC AS systemDesc, s.APPLIED_WAS_INSTANCE AS appliedWasInstance FROM FWK_SYSTEM s WHERE s.GW_ID = #{gwId} AND s.SYSTEM_ID = #{systemId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_SYSTEM WHERE GW_ID = #{gwId} AND SYSTEM_ID = #{systemId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_SYSTEM ( GW_ID, SYSTEM_ID, OPER_MODE_TYPE, IP, PORT, STOP_YN, SYSTEM_DESC, APPLIED_WAS_INSTANCE ) VALUES ( #{dto.gwId}, #{dto.systemId}, #{dto.operModeType}, #{dto.ip}, #{dto.port}, #{dto.stopYn}, #{dto.systemDesc}, #{dto.appliedWasInstance} )
mapper.update: UPDATE FWK_SYSTEM SET SYSTEM_ID = #{dto.systemId}, OPER_MODE_TYPE = #{dto.operModeType}, IP = #{dto.ip}, PORT = #{dto.port}, STOP_YN = #{dto.stopYn}, SYSTEM_DESC = #{dto.systemDesc}, APPLIED_WAS_INSTANCE = #{dto.appliedWasInstance} WHERE GW_ID = #{dto.gwId} AND SYSTEM_ID = #{dto.systemId}
mapper.sql: s.GW_ID AS gwId, s.SYSTEM_ID AS systemId, s.OPER_MODE_TYPE AS operModeType, s.IP AS ip, s.PORT AS port, s.STOP_YN AS stopYn, s.SYSTEM_DESC AS systemDesc, s.APPLIED_WAS_INSTANCE AS appliedWasInstance
